description.value:
Used as a replacement for skills rolled with base COOL, EMP, or WILL

Used for rolling in checks which involve force of will, charisma, general intelligence, or intution. Note that if the check is specialized and the mook is not, the DV should be raised 1-3 tiers.

Used as a replacement for fighting or ranged weapon skills, excluding evasion. Note that this uses REF as a base for reasons involving initiative - set REF of the mook first, then consider that number when considering the Martial skill.
Used as a replacement for skills which rely on base Body or Dex, which are not covered by the Martial skill, and for Evasion.
Used for skills which rely on base INT or TECH.
A very heavy pistol. It can't be concealed.
Deals no Damage. Fills a 10m/yd x 10m/yd with smoke for 1 minute. Tasks obscured by smoke have a -4 penalty.
Deals no Damage. Hit targets with Meat eyes roll DV13 Resist Torture/Drugs Check. On fail suffer Damaged Eye Critical Injury (See pg. 188) for 1 minute. Does not deal critical bonus damage.
Anytime the stun baton deals damage, it requires an Endurance check: DV = 10+dmg. On failure, the target is stunned for their next turn.

A basic lob or pitch of an object. Use an Action to make a Ranged Attack at up to 25m/yds. Targets can choose to Dodge your throw if they can Dodge bullets. Melee weapons deal their base damage, but don't penetrate half SP.
A shield with a bit more mass, used for riot control. Requires BODY 7 to wield effectively.

Intended as a direct substitute/improvement to regular armor, to compensate for ablation changes.

-2 to REF, DEX, and MOVE - these penalties do not stack with those for the helmet, and are reduced/improved by 1 for each BODY point the wearer has above 6 (change the armor penalty stat in the item settings tab). Does not ablate while at or above 13 SP unless damage exceeds SP, the blow is from a melee weapon, or AP ammo is used.

Intended as a direct substitute/improvement to regular armor, to compensate for ablation changes.

-2 to REF, DEX, and MOVE - these penalties do not stack with those for the helmet, and are reduced/improved by 1 for each BODY point the wearer has above 6 (change the armor penalty stat in the item settings tab). Does not ablate while at or above 13 SP unless damage exceeds SP, the blow is from a melee weapon, or AP ammo is used.

information.notes:
Mook Tier - Tier 3/Rank-And-File - Low-level but accredited members of NC's various groups, with enough authority to wear the org's colors but not enough to pose a real threat on their own.

Corp-Wide Ability - Advanced Tactics: Once per round after a Militech goon has taken an action, select another goon of the same type; they may immediately take the same action, if eligible to do so.

Ability - Suppressor Unit: Immune to the effects of smoke and teargas grenades (can see normally, no save, etc) courtesy of hellish conditioning and advanced cyberware. Additionally, for each suppressor on the field, they may extend this immunity to an additional Militech goon. Cannot be lit on fire.

Extra Gear - Each suppressor is suppled with either a smoke grenade or a teargas grenade.

Who hasn’t heard of suppressors, or seen the pictures? Maybe the most hated mercs in history, and that’s saying something. Padded suits and riot shields to put down the unrest when the corp decides not to pay its taxes that year, eh? Put a few of them down for me, and we’ll both be sleeping better at night.
